name: Claude Code Plugins
description: Installs Claude Code plugins from marketplaces at build time

enableRalphLoop.description: Install Ralph Loop plugin from the official marketplace

enableObraSuperpowers.description: Install Obra Superpowers plugin from the official marketplace

customPlugins.description: Comma-separated list of additional plugins to install as plugin@marketplace

customMarketplaces.description: Comma-separated list of additional marketplaces to add as owner/repo or owner/repo#ref

skipOnFailure.description: Skip plugin installation if a plugin or marketplace fails instead of failing the build

verifyArtifacts.description: After installation, verify that all requested plugins appear in enabledPlugins and fail the build if any are missing
